description: Join us at John K. King Used & Rare Books for an exclusive book signing event with the bestselling author Anthony Doerr, celebrating their work, including "All the Light We Cannot See". Copies of the book will be available for purchase, and the author will sign personal copies. Q&A session to precede signing.
venue: John K. King Used & Rare Books

title: Book Discussion: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: Our monthly community book club will gather to discuss "The Hobbit" by J.R.R. Tolkien. Share your thoughts, analyze the plot, and connect with fellow readers in a cozy, relaxed setting at The Last Bookstore. Refreshments served.

title: Author Signing: Shane Parrish

description: Join us at Magers & Quinn Booksellers for an exclusive book signing event with the bestselling author Shane Parrish, celebrating their work, including "Clear Thinking". Copies of the book will be available for purchase, and the author will sign personal copies. Q&A session to precede signing.

title: Author Signing: Isabel Allende
